creator: rsimmons@mail.wlcg.com
text:
These error started being logged to /var/log/maillog after upgrading to the current port of uw-imap (0104101757).
Apr 19 22:56:45 mail ipop3d[85317]: unable to resolve symbol: pam_sm_open_session
Apr 19 22:56:45 mail ipop3d[85317]: unable to resolve symbol: pam_sm_close_session
This began after the upgrade, and installing the old imap-uw from a package again, causes the problem to stop.

Fix: 

Quit following a BETA product! >:)
Really, I'm not sure how to fix it, the uw code is scary.
How-To-Repeat: Just install the new port of uw-imap and check the maillog just before a user tries to connect to imap or pop.
